scope: HTTP FTP SFTP 0B or 99 percent stalls
acceptance: The stall condition is traced in the native command path and does not depend on BitTorrent state.
verification: `testNativeDownloadProgressTimeout` exercises a zero-payload native download command and times out by session payload progress.
notes: The watchdog lives in DownloadCommand, not AbstractCommand.

target_files: native download command files; focused tests
acceptance: Long zero-progress stalls trigger retry or failure according to existing retry policy without corrupting completed downloads.
verification: `build/libtorrent-positive/aria2_tests 'All Tests/aria2::AbstractCommandTest'` passed with `OK (2)`; full `build/libtorrent-positive/aria2_tests` passed with `OK (820)`.
notes: The watchdog uses the existing command timeout and retry exception path.

scope: Boundary between libtorrent and native downloads
target_files: new libtorrent backend files; native command files
acceptance: The non-BT watchdog cannot interfere with libtorrent torrent handles.
verification: Boundary inspection confirmed libtorrent uses the session command path instead of DownloadCommand; RequestGroup and RPC focused suites passed.
